title: Recorded Future Typosquat Alert Handling
content:
Template playbook showing suggested steps to triage typo squat alerts. Classifier/Mapper are available to ingest Recorded Future Typo squat Alerts.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Recorded Future pack (RecordedFuture, partner-supported).

Inputs — domain.

Integrations/scripts used: CensysV2, Dig, Recorded Future v2, Whois, urlscan.io.
